page_title: Tips For Pokemon Selection in Team Preview | Pokemon Champions｜Game8

content.title: Send Out Your Defensive Pokemon First to Withstand Opposing Attacks
content.body: Pokemon with High Defense Hippowdon Archaludon Corviknight

content.title: Ensure That Each Member Can Take Out the Opposing Team
content.body: You can try choosing Pokemon that are all-rounders in your team, enabling you to respond against any sort of situation during battle.

content.title: Pick 3 Pokemon That Can Go Up Against the Whole Opposing Team
content.body: One of the simple ways to ensure victory during Pokemon Selection is to pick out 3 Pokemon that can possibly beat out the entire roster of the opposing team.

content.title: Prepare Countermeasures Once You've Lost Your Initial Turn
content.body: Example Scenario 1 vs You hypothetically send out Tyranitar , which is a bad matchup against Garchomp . 2 ⇆ You switch your Tyranitar with a Coviknight . 3 vs You now have the advantage as your hypothetical Corviknight is now facing the opponent's Garchomp .

content.title: Try Optimizing Your Team Around a Pokemon That Can Mega Evolve
content.body: Sample Team Mega Kangaskhan Hippowdon Greninja
